label: Improved
items: The Plants and Watchlist screens got a big clean-up — one clear search bar leads each page, the button pile-up moved into a tidy ⋯ menu, and filters open in a bottom sheet with a live result count.
One search now does everything: type a name and your own plants appear first ("In your Shed" / "On your watchlist"), with the library right below — no more separate search boxes.
Little things: bigger touch targets on Senescence, clearable filter chips, and your favourites are one tap away on every screen.
